case_title: MU YI ZHU VS. CLEAN X-PRESS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MU YI ZHU IS PRESENT. COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPERTER, REBECCA CHAU, PROVIDES INTERPERTER ASSISTANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CLEAN X-PRESS, REPRESETNED BY CRESENCIA TORTUYA, OWNER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE DEFENDANT IS NOT THE CORRECT PARTY TO BE SUED AND IS NOT LIABLE FOR DAMAGES CAUSED TO PLAINTIFF. THE COURT DISMISSES THE MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE. A NEW CLAIM SHOULD BE OPENED AGAINST THE PARTY THAT CREATED THE HAZARD WHICH CAUSED PLAINTIFF'S INJURY. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CRESCENCIA TORTUYA, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT CLEAN X-PRESS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$120.00) SERVED AUG-05-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLEAN X-PRESS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ZHU, MU YI AS TO DEFENDANT CLEAN X-PRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)
